pageTitle: Vehicle Hire in East Sussex | Car & Van Hire Sussex | Choice Vehicle Rentals
markdown:
- 1
- 2

We hire a range of **Vans**(including Automatics), **Cars** of various sizes, **Minibuses**(7 to 17 seats) and **Trucks**, from our 6 branches across the South of England.

# Choice Vehicle Rentals

## East Sussex Vehicle Hire in Brighton, Hove, Hassocks, Crawley, Uckfield & Eastbourne

We also Hire Vehicles for Europe.  Luton vans for moving to France. Multi Seaters for holidays. Call for prices **(web quotes are the UK only)**

Check our prices for hiring a vehicle. Also there is no charge if you wish to change or cancel a booking, provided it is done before the booking is due to start.

#### _Driver Ages_

We should be able to hire to you provided you are aged between 21 and 75, subject to your driving licence, multi seaters are limited to 25 to 70. If you are unsure please email us and we can assist.

Read More

Vehicle Rental Manager

### Contact Details

**Choice Vehicle Rentals**

3 Faraday Close, Eastbourne, East Sussex, BN22 9BH

[01323 520353](tel:01323520353) [booking@choicevehiclerentals.com](mailto:booking@choicevehiclerentals.com)

##### Opening Times

Mon - Fri: 8:30am – 17:30

Sat: 8:30am – 17:30

Sun: Closed

Please note opening hours during holiday periods may be subject to change. For more information please contact us.
